scalp_trend.label: Scalp Trend
scalp_trend.description: Bot dasar seperti sekarang. Fokus ke follow-through cepat dengan trend 15m dan trigger 3m untuk ambil gerakan pendek yang bersih.

day_trade.label: Day Trade
day_trade.description: Lebih sabar untuk target harian kecil tapi rapi. Entry lebih jarang, target sedikit lebih lebar, dan hold lebih panjang daripada scalp murni.

swing_trade.label: Swing Trade
swing_trade.description: Untuk baca trend besar ala 1D dan cari setup lebih tenang di 4H. Cocok kalau mau lebih sabar dan tidak mengejar gerakan kecil setiap saat.

range_scalp.label: Range Scalp
range_scalp.description: Eksperimental untuk market sideway. Tetap cepat, tapi lebih toleran ke trend yang tidak terlalu kuat dan lebih fokus ke re-entry di area netral.

custom.label: Custom Bot Type
custom.description: Profile bot type buatan user. Gunakan ini kalau mau mengatur struktur setup sendiri tanpa mengubah profile bot type bawaan.

bullish.label: Bullish
bullish.description: Market kuat dan cukup hidup. Entry boleh lebih percaya diri selama breakout dan volume tetap rapi.

bullish_slow.label: Bullish Slow
bullish_slow.description: Trend naik tapi lambat. Fokus ke setup bersih, longgarkan sedikit volume dan ATR tanpa memaksa breakout jelek.

neutral.label: Neutral
neutral.description: Market belum jelas. Entry tetap boleh, tapi kualitas setup harus lebih rapi dan fee tetap tertutup.

bearish.label: Bearish
bearish.description: Market lemah. Default-nya watch only supaya style trading tidak dipaksa melawan arah market.

choppy.label: Choppy
choppy.description: Noise tinggi dan follow-through jelek. Default-nya watch only untuk menghindari overtrade.

custom.label: Custom Market
custom.description: Profile market buatan user. Gunakan ini kalau mau tuning sendiri tanpa mengubah preset market bawaan.

ai_agent.label: AI Agent Profile
ai_agent.description: Profile kerja AI Agent. Diisi otomatis dari keputusan agent tanpa mengubah preset market profile bawaan.

conservative.label: Conservative
conservative.description: Paling selektif. Cocok kalau modal kecil dan mau minim noise.

normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Seimbang. Masih ketat, tapi tidak terlalu jarang entry.

aggressive.label: Aggressive Light
aggressive.description: Lebih sering cari entry dan lebih cepat rotasi, tapi tetap dijaga oleh stale trade dan guard biaya.

professional.label: Professional
professional.description: Seimbang tapi tajam. Fokus ke setup yang rapi, proteksi profit, dan frekuensi entry yang tetap realistis.

bigmoney.label: Big Money
bigmoney.description: Lebih sabar dan selektif. Cocok untuk modal lebih besar yang butuh entry bersih, sizing tenang, dan proteksi profit yang disiplin.

hyper.label: Hyper Scalp
hyper.description: Paling longgar. TP 1.5%, exit cepat, trailing ringan untuk kunci fee/slippage, tanpa limit trade harian.

custom.label: Custom Trade
custom.description: Profile gaya trading buatan user. Pakai ini kalau mau simpan setting sendiri tanpa mengubah mode bawaan.

activeBotTypeDescription: Profile bot type buatan user. Gunakan ini kalau mau mengatur struktur setup sendiri tanpa mengubah profile bot type bawaan.
activeModeDescription: Profile gaya trading buatan user. Pakai ini kalau mau simpan setting sendiri tanpa mengubah mode bawaan.

aiAgent.reason: Market shows mixed momentum with moderate upside; slightly raise thresholds and widen ATR band to improve entry quality while preserving multiple-trade opportunity capture.

lastDecision.reason: Market shows mixed momentum with moderate upside; slightly raise thresholds and widen ATR band to improve entry quality while preserving multiple-trade opportunity capture.

aiAgent.lastPrompt:
Your role is top global spot trading to tune the bot for the next several trades over the next couple of hours.

These settings should aim for the best overall trading result during that window.

Optimize for easy entry with healthy win rate, and enough opportunity capture across multiple trades, not just one trade.

Do not become overly restrictive unless market conditions are clearly poor.

Focus on market recap from rankedCandidates and minimalGlobalContext

Prefer smart, deliberate changes over broad rewrites.

If conditions are mixed or unclear, keep changes minimal and explain the reason briefly.

Tune entryOverrides only. Do not change allowEntries, risk, sizing, pairs, botType, TP, SL, cooldown.

Return one valid JSON object only. No markdown. No extra text. Do not echo context.

Return only: {"entryOverrides":{<changed_fields_only>},"reason":"<short_reason>"}. Numbers for MARKET_FILTER_KEYS, booleans for QUALITY_FILTER_KEYS. Omit unchanged fields.

messages.content:
Your role is top global spot trading to tune the bot for the next several trades over the next couple of hours.

These settings should aim for the best overall trading result during that window.

Optimize for easy entry with healthy win rate, and enough opportunity capture across multiple trades, not just one trade.

Do not become overly restrictive unless market conditions are clearly poor.

Focus on market recap from rankedCandidates and minimalGlobalContext

Prefer smart, deliberate changes over broad rewrites.

If conditions are mixed or unclear, keep changes minimal and explain the reason briefly.

Tune entryOverrides only. Do not change allowEntries, risk, sizing, pairs, botType, TP, SL, cooldown.

Return one valid JSON object only. No markdown. No extra text. Do not echo context.

Return only: {"entryOverrides":{<changed_fields_only>},"reason":"<short_reason>"}. Numbers for MARKET_FILTER_KEYS, booleans for QUALITY_FILTER_KEYS. Omit unchanged fields.
